working_on: Routine task AUDIT-LAN (T-PHASE-5-AUDIT) — Philosophy of language subdomain audit. SEP-anchored review of a deterministic 35.5%-density edge sample (k=11 of N=31) plus an edge-anchored node sample (8 of 15 unique nodes), per the master-plan prompt templates at engine/build_readiness/phase_5_production_audit.md. Single deliverable: engine/build_readiness/phase_5_production_audit_evidence/language.md. Routine-mode is parametric-only — empirical-fortification branch prohibited per master-plan §"Empirical-fortification branch" routine-mode prohibition (load-bearing until T1-A through T1-D close at the closeout interactive session per ADR 0053).
declared_scope: Author engine/build_readiness/phase_5_production_audit_evidence/language.md as candidate-findings evidence for the 11-edge sample (k=11 of N=31 within-language edges from 0070_seed_language_part1.sql; 35.5% density per master-plan §"Sample-size policy" AUDIT-LAN row) plus the 8-node edge-anchored sample (from a 15-element edge-anchored union) — verdict + SEP-anchored reasoning + confidence per element per the verbatim master-plan prompt templates and evidence-file schema. No other tracked files modified beyond the operational allowlist (current.json, current_plan.md, auto_target.json status fields, register_state.json, archive/S-0112.json, ENGINE_LOG.md, STATE.md). Parametric-only review; empirical-fortification branch prohibited for routine sessions until T1-A through T1-D close at the closeout. phase: NA-routine

scope_delivery.explanation: Yes — AUDIT-LAN fully delivered: 11-edge + 8-node SEP-anchored review landed in language.md (178 lines) per the master-plan prompt templates and evidence-file schema; both task criteria pass; no descope, reorder, or deferral mid-session. Parametric-only review per master-plan §"Empirical-fortification branch" routine-mode prohibition; three medium-confidence + mutation-implying verdicts (E-2 speech_act→performative_utterance reversed-MED; E-3 speech_act→presupposition defensible-MED; E-5 causal_theory_of_reference→rigid_designator defensible-MED) get fortified at the closeout. E-10 deflationary_theory_of_truth→tarskis_t_schema is reversed-HIGH and skips the empirical-fortification branch per master-plan cost-benefit triage.

outcome_summary: Routine session S-0112 against T-PHASE-5-AUDIT task AUDIT-LAN landed an 11-edge + 8-node SEP-anchored review per the master-plan prompt templates at engine/build_readiness/phase_5_production_audit.md (per S-0082 master-plan + S-0081 audit-warrant gate decision drawer in paideia/decisions; per S-0104 cross-bridge calibration; per S-0105 epistemology + S-0108 ethics + S-0109 metaphysics + S-0110 mind + S-0111 logic precedents; per S-0107 master-plan tightening that made the empirical-fortification branch routine-mode prohibition load-bearing). Single deliverable: engine/build_readiness/phase_5_production_audit_evidence/language.md (178 lines). Edge-verdict tally: 7 sound (63.6%), 2 defensible (E-3 speech_act→presupposition — cross-tradition prereq-strength: Strawson 1950 presuppositional alternative to Russell predates Austin 1955 and developed independently; speech-act theory is broad-pragmatics-organizational-frame but not strict-historical-prereq; more proximate prereq would be definite_description; E-5 causal_theory_of_reference→rigid_designator — property-vs-mechanism prereq-strength: rigid designation is semantic property definable independent of any reference-fixing mechanism, but Kripke's argumentative deployment interweaves the property with the causal-theoretic story; more proximate prereq would be proper_name), 2 reversed (E-2 speech_act→performative_utterance reversed-medium — developmental-arc reversal where Austin's 1955 historical seed is taught after the systematized framework that subsumes it; the migration's own teaching_notes for both nodes walk the developmental arc performatives→speech-act-framework, contradicting the seed edge direction; E-10 deflationary_theory_of_truth→tarskis_t_schema reversed-HIGH — tools-vs-position reversal where Tarski's 1933 technical foundation is taught after the deflationist position that exploits it; matches S-0109 E-3 + E-12 + S-0110 E-12 in shape — now corroborated cross-subdomain). Node-verdict tally: 8 sound, 0 granularity-mismatch, 0 authenticity concerns. Substantive defects: 4 of 19 sampled elements (21%) — HIGHEST within-subdomain rate of the routine block to date; above S-0108 ethics (16.7%), S-0109 metaphysics (14.3%), S-0110 mind (10.8%), S-0111 logic (5%), S-0105 epistemology (5.4%); below the cross-bridge baseline (35.2% per AUDIT-CB at S-0104) so within-subdomain-cleaner-than-bridges holds. The pattern fits the structural prediction that philosophy of language has more contested developmental-arc and tools-vs-position orderings than the formal-systems-hierarchy-driven logic seed (where pedagogical direction is tightly determined by formal containment relations). Mid-sample expansion trigger (>60% at half-sample → expand to 50%) was below the trigger — half-sample defect rate (E-1 through E-5) was 2/5 = 40%; standard 35% density held. Two reversal patterns of distinct shape surfaced — developmental-arc reversal (E-2: historical seed taught after systematized framework that subsumes it) and tools-vs-position reversal (E-10: technical foundation taught after the philosophical position that exploits it; matches S-0109 E-3 modality→essence_metaphysical, S-0109 E-12 abstract_object→possible_worlds, S-0110 E-12 supervenience_mental→mental_causation in shape — now corroborated cross-subdomain). Two defensible patterns of distinct shape surfaced — cross-tradition prereq-strength (E-3) and property-vs-mechanism prereq-strength (E-5); both cases where a more proximate prereq exists and the seed's chosen prereq is illuminative-but-not-strictly-required. Zero granularity-mismatch in 8 sampled nodes — distinct from S-0105 N-8 bayesian_epistemology, S-0108 N-4 + N-9, S-0109 N-4 + N-6, S-0110 N-2 phenomenology; all 8 sampled nodes are at appropriate concept-level granularity (metaphysical/semantic notion proposition; theory of reference causal_theory_of_reference; pragmatic-theoretic notions speech_act / performative_utterance / gricean_maxims / presupposition; kind of singular referring expression proper_name; modal-semantic technical term rigid_designator). The discipline-label issue surfaces only at the foundation-spine edge level (E-6 philosophy_of_language→reference is in the sampled set as discipline-label-as-prereq pattern recorded for closeout pattern-aggregation; sound on discipline-as-umbrella reading), not at per-node level for the sampled set. Zero authenticity concerns — all summaries read as instructional voice with concept-grounded specificity (canonical citations Frege 1892, Russell 1905, Tarski 1933, Austin 1955, Searle 1969, Grice 1975, Kripke 1972, Putnam 1975, Donnellan 1970; technical apparatus where appropriate; right level of detail for the granularity). One load-bearing aggregate observation surfaced for the closeout: the cluster pattern (developmental-arc + tools-vs-position + property-vs-mechanism reversal/defensibility shapes) is now corroborated across subdomains S-0109 / S-0110 / S-0112 — together suggest a CLASS of ordering-by-development failures distinct from S-0104 cross-bridge pedagogical-direction-vs-summary-prose pattern, S-0108 species-shadowing-genus pattern, S-0109 long-distance-shortcut pattern, S-0111 multi-prereq overdetermined pattern. No new gate-feasible audit-system-input class authored as deliverable — the four pre-listed master-plan proposals plus S-0104 cross_bridge_pedagogical_direction_inconsistent_with_summary candidate plus S-0110 argument-vs-position directionality candidate were not extended (within-language data did not corroborate any new pattern beyond those already identified, but the cluster pattern across subdomains is closeout synthesis surface). Empty `evidence` field uniform null across all 31 within-language edges (master-plan §T2-E pre-listed; confirmed graph-wide again — seventh session in a row with this pattern, after AUDIT-CB / AUDIT-EPI / AUDIT-ETH / AUDIT-MET / AUDIT-MIN / AUDIT-LOG). Parametric-only review per master-plan routine-mode prohibition (load-bearing until T1-A through T1-D close at the closeout per ADR 0053); medium-confidence + mutation-implying verdicts (E-2, E-3, E-5) get fortified at the closeout per master-plan §"Forward pointers to closeout" / ADR 0059. E-10 reversed-HIGH skips the empirical-fortification branch per master-plan cost-benefit triage (high-confidence verdicts skip even when implying graph mutation). 0 HANDOFF entries; 0 Issues filed; 0 hard-fails (validate.py 31 checks; soft-warns 372 = 366 Phase-5 missing_rigor_score carryover + 5 issue_collision + 1 adr_consequences_deliverable_audit; the issue_collision count of 5 vs S-0111 baseline of 5 is unchanged). AUDIT-LAN criteria pass (file_exists + validate_passes); marked complete in close commit. Next eligible task: AUDIT-SCI (depends_on AUDIT-CB satisfied + no other dependencies; philosophy of science subdomain, 11 of 30 edges at 35% density). 4 subdomain audits + AUDIT-HT remain in T-PHASE-5-AUDIT before closeout.
